scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Get-ChildItem -Recurse dist -Filter *.js | Select-String -Pattern 'verified=eq.true|businesses.verified') { Write-Host 'Forbidden verified string found in dist JS' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 } else { Write-Host 'Verify passed: no forbidden verified strings found.' -ForegroundColor Green; exit 0 }"
